strategy: Hit with Balance; he takes +75% from it. Fire, Myth, and Life also work (+5%); avoid Ice, Storm, and Death (70% resist).

Clear the Round-1 Tower Shields with double Shatter. He opens with six -50% shields; two Shatters (or Shatter Treasure Cards if no Myth wizard is present) strip them. Once gone, he never recasts them.

Play around the -50% Fortify aura. Healing, blading, and trapping all re-trigger it, so accept it will be up and plan to punch through rather than remove it. Do not cast Supernova, which only makes him recast the aura.
Use Shadow Shrike to beat the aura. Have the hitter cast Shadow Shrike before the big hit; support can add Shatter on the boss.
Blade and Feint like a normal boss once the shields are down, then a few rounds in have the hitter Shrike and land the kill. He is stunable, so stuns can buy setup Rounds.
He carries an Aegis-protected Balanceblade, so a single steal won't take it. Keep a heal ready for the Round-9-then-every-10 Chimera cast.
cheatNotes: Joining late gets Impede plus two Indemnity-protected universal traps (+25% and +35%) on you; enter on time.

On turn 1 he puts up a Star Tower Shield (six -50% shields total) and a -50% Fortify aura, recast at the end of each cycle; casting Supernova forces an extra recast. Double Shatter removes the shields for good, and Shadow Shrike punches through the aura.
Every tenth Round (starting Round 9) he Chimeras a random wizard; keep a heal ready on that timer.
